economic_notes: First Nation has wholly-owned business entities and partnerships including Tallcree Wildland Limited Partnership (firefighting), Netaskinan Development Limited Partnership (forestry/timber royalties), Netaskinan Contracting Limited Partnership (contract work), Tipeemso Development Limited Partnership (property development), and 2133182 Alberta Ltd. (total revenue $9.56M). Land Entitlement Trust held at $8.2M.
notes: Fiscal year 2020 (ended March 31, 2020). The First Nation uses modified equity method for government business enterprises and partnerships. Investments in partnerships total $9.1M and business entities $1.74M. Funds held in trust of $8.36M (Land Entitlement Trust, Capital Trust, Revenue Trust) are on balance sheet with offsetting accumulated surplus. Term loans due on demand of $1.165M classified separately from long-term debt of $166K. Designated/restricted cash within cash balance of $3.68M for capital projects and ISC programs. First Nation guaranteed Netaskinan Contracting LP finance lease ($145,816) and 2133182 Alberta Ltd. operating line ($264,772). No remuneration schedule found in extracted text. Education expenses combined Post Secondary ($244,053) + Education ($4,215,658) = $4,459,711. Equity Funds segment shows negative expenses of -$433,013 (gain). Annual debt service includes repayment of term loans on demand ($70,470) and bank indebtedness ($139,144) = $209,614.
